author: codex-monica-api

patch.value: Authoritative scope is Monica stable 4.x routes/api.php at commit 32028ce3ce79cef38df5d27a297e5b20680f0065 plus official API docs. Implement missing statistics, places, life events, upcoming reminders, and me-contact association; reconcile contact action route variants; keep all live proof GET-only under read-only mode; preserve schema-valid agent outputs and complete help/docs.
Complete Monica 4.x API parity and resilient instance diagnostics
Align monica-cli with Monica stable 4.x routes, expose missing resources and actions, and prevent systemic server failures from being misreported as endpoint incompatibility.

Every stable 4.x API route has an intentional CLI/API mapping or documented compatibility decision; Capability and research probes distinguish endpoint unsupported responses from systemic authentication/server failures; New commands provide detailed help, default TOON, valid JSON/YAML/Markdown/table output where applicable, and strict TypeScript types; All code files are at most 300 physical lines and release/coverage/read-only E2E gates pass without mutating Monica data
Official stable route inventory, current CLI surface, complete pm lineage, and live read-only diagnostics have been inspected.
Agents can automate the full supported Monica surface with honest machine-readable capability data.
Closes silent feature gaps and prevents unsafe or impossible plans derived from false capability classifications.
Production-ready Monica 4.x route parity with read-only verified diagnostics and durable API documentation.
The requested live research exposed both missing stable routes and a production instance failure that current diagnostics misclassify.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Duplicate-safe all-status search and dedupe-audit found no existing API parity item. Monica stable 4.x source exposes statistics places lifeevents reminders/upcoming me/contact and contact work food introduction routes missing or drifted from the current reference.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: The supplied instance currently fails every API request with HTTP 500 because Laravel cannot append storage/logs/laravel-2026-07-21.log and also reports Cloudflare trust-proxy loading failure. Treat this as systemic instance health not 31 unsupported resources; do not store credentials in pm.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Documentation-only endpoint coverage can report 100 percent while source-route parity is incomplete; route-source provenance and systemic-failure semantics must be first-class research data.

value.note: Capability classification and instance health
Agent API research surface
Stable route inventory
Coverage and regression gate
Actual CLI read-only instance proof
Production release gate
Typed SDK and resource documentation
Live instance and systemic failure semantics

message: Create official-source Monica API parity feature

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: User elevated repo-wide code quality to the highest priority: forbid any except documented necessity; forbid inline/dynamic imports and non-erasable TypeScript syntax; inline trivial single-use helpers; derive external types from installed declarations; enforce source LOC and high-quality docstring coverage; require honest 100/100/100/100 source coverage with efficient non-duplicative tests across unit, integration, functional, smoke, read-only E2E/dogfood, performance, acceptance and PM validation; strengthen mandatory CI quality/security/duplication gates without exclusion-based or synthetic coverage cheating.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Decision: coverage, docstrings, LOC, strict TypeScript syntax, duplication, PM lint, and reproducible security/quality checks are release-blocking gates. Existing violations are in scope repo-wide, including pre-existing oversized source and test files.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Re-verified the authoritative Monica 4.x source live on 2026-07-21: head remains 32028ce3ce79cef38df5d27a297e5b20680f0065. routes/api.php plus Place, LifeEvent, Reminder, Avatar, Me controllers/services/resources confirm statistics, places, lifeevents, reminders/upcoming/{month}, POST/DELETE me/contact, PUT contact work/food/introduction/avatar and their request/response fields.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Honest all-source Vitest coverage now blocks release at 52.77% statements, 53.89% branches, 68.43% functions, 52.77% lines with 553 passing tests. Thresholds remain 100/100/100/100; no source exclusions or synthetic coverage bypasses will be used.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: The CLI had broad endpoint wrapper tests but most Commander action bodies and the real HTTP/config runtime were not executed, so previous narrow coverage floors concealed command-layer and client-layer risk.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Refactored duplicated legacy command handlers for activities, gifts, journal, and reminders onto the typed CRUD execution kernel. Added strict union/integer parsers, exact option-to-API mappings, custom upcoming/photo actions, and focused coverage. Full suite remains green; coverage remediation continues without threshold exclusions or ignore directives.

patch.value: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test

value.note: Production release gate

message: Link complete Monica 4.x parity implementation and verification surface

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Implemented the stable Monica 4.x parity surface: places and life-events CRUD, public statistics, upcoming reminders, me/contact association, introduction/avatar/work/food profile actions, typed CRUD/attachment kernels, complete help registration, and source-derived API snapshots. Refactored adjacent legacy handlers onto typed shared execution without changing live data.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Verification milestone: 113 Vitest files and 830 tests pass with exact 100% statements, 100% branches, 100% functions, and 100% lines across every src TypeScript file. Repo-wide quality gate covers 247 source/test files, 574/574 documented exports, <=300 executable lines, no explicit any, no inline/dynamic imports, and erasable TypeScript only. jscpd duplication is 4.53% under the 5% gate.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: A live E2E harness must distinguish product failures from an unavailable self-hosted instance without hiding either: the configured server returns a Laravel storage/logs permission failure, while write-guard commands prove every attempted mutation is blocked locally before fetch. The report records unavailable commands as expected infrastructure failures and preserves/restores private settings byte-for-byte.

value.note: Production release gate

value.command: bunx tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node scripts/pr-review-loop.ts
value.note: Typed review-loop utility gate

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Read-only acceptance is green: 95 actual monica command checks, 42 locally verifiable passes, 53 expected API-dependent failures after an independent unhealthy capability preflight, zero unexplained failures, five mutation guards blocked locally, and private settings restored. The server remains unavailable because Laravel cannot write storage logs; no Monica data was changed.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Security decision: pin fixed transitive brace-expansion, flatted, js-yaml, and picomatch releases through Bun overrides because current tool dependency ranges retained nine known DoS/prototype-pollution advisories. bun audit now reports zero vulnerabilities and the exact repository gate remains green.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Exact-head bot review governance benefits from a single GraphQL inventory that includes conversation comments, submitted reviews, inline threads, resolution state, reactions, and check runs; native reaction/reply/resolve operations make acknowledgement auditable instead of relying on a flat PR summary.

author: codex-monica-api
message: Align feature release metadata with second release tag slot for 2026-07-21

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: Version policy selected 2026.7.21-2 because one release tag already exists for 2026-07-21; package, lockfile, and PM release metadata are aligned.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: PR #59 CI round 1 found two actionable portability/security issues: GitHub runners lacked rg for the source-quality script, and CodeQL flagged the unbounded email regex. Replaced discovery with Node filesystem traversal and email validation with linear bounded string checks; added eight malformed-email cases. Local proof is 838 tests at exact 100/100/100/100 and zero dependency vulnerabilities.

value.author: codex-monica-api
value.text: PR #59 CI round 2 found the help audit depended on a workstation-global monica link. It now executes the freshly built dist/index.js via the current Bun runtime with argument arrays; clean-runner-equivalent build and all 273 help commands pass locally, with 838 exact-coverage tests.

patch.value: Stable Monica 4.x API parity, resilient capability semantics, agent/programmatic UX, exact quality gates, read-only acceptance, and review governance are implemented and verified for release 2026.7.21-2.

author: codex-monica-api

patch.value: Completed stable Monica 4.x route parity and hardened CLI diagnostics, agent output, release governance, and read-only safety.
Every stable route has an intentional typed CLI mapping or documented compatibility decision, with exact quality gates and no live Monica mutations.

Stable resources and actions are implemented; 838 tests and 273 help checks pass; coverage is 100/100/100/100; dependency, CodeQL, secret, Bun, and Node gates are green; read-only live checks changed no data.

message: Complete feature resolution evidence after strict close validation
